claim: OpenAI Agents SDK provides agent handoffs (specialized agents), guard rails, and tracing as core features for production agentic systems
actionable: Use the OpenAI Agents SDK's handoff mechanism to delegate tasks to specialized agents instead of loading all tools into one agent
source_title: OpenAI's BRAND NEW Agents SDK (Crash Course)

claim: Structured outputs in agent SDKs reduce hallucinations by forcing models to output JSON with specific required fields
actionable: Define Pydantic models with required fields; pass them as output_type to agent functions to ensure consistent, JSON responses
source_title: OpenAI's BRAND NEW Agents SDK (Crash Course)

claim: Adding tools to agents requires clear docstrings; LLMs determine tool parameters based on conversation context
actionable: Write detailed docstrings for tool functions explaining when/how to use them; let the LLM infer parameters from context
source_title: OpenAI's BRAND NEW Agents SDK (Crash Course)

claim: Specialized agents (mixture of experts) prevent hallucinations better than loading many tools into a single agent
actionable: For domains with many tools (flights, hotels, activities), create separate agents with focused tool sets and handoff between them
source_title: OpenAI's BRAND NEW Agents SDK (Crash Course)

claim: Guard rails in agents validate input before execution and can stop responses if hallucinations are detected
actionable: Implement guard rail functions that check budget/constraints before agents plan; return trip_wire_triggered to cut execution short if unrealistic
source_title: OpenAI's BRAND NEW Agents SDK (Crash Course)

claim: Context management in agents enables tools to access user metadata without exposing it to the LLM prompt
actionable: Store user preferences (budget, airline, amenities) in a context class; pass via runner.run() parameter; access in tool functions via wrapper.context
source_title: OpenAI's BRAND NEW Agents SDK (Crash Course)

claim: OpenAI Agents SDK lacks flexibility in handoff rules, human-in-the-loop approval, and test/mock functionality compared to PydanticAI and LangGraph
actionable: If you need custom handoff rules, human approval before handoffs, or extensive testing, consider PydanticAI or LangGraph instead
source_title: OpenAI's BRAND NEW Agents SDK (Crash Course)

claim: Tracing with integrations like Pydantic Logfire enables 10M traces/month free and works with non-OpenAI models
actionable: Use logfire.configure() in OpenAI Agents SDK to get free production tracing with OpenRouter or Ollama models
source_title: OpenAI's BRAND NEW Agents SDK (Crash Course)
